title: PolicyExemption
description: Time-boxed, audited, owner-approved exemption to a specific rule assignment. Every field is validated on load; a missing required field or a self-approval MUST abort the merge (see architecture.instructions.md § Human Override).

id.description: Stable per-exemption id; a rename produces a new record.

rule_id.description: The rule whose enforce mode this exemption suppresses.

subscription_id.description: Azure subscription the exemption applies to.

resource_group.description: Optional; narrower than subscription-wide when set.

resource_ref.description: Optional; narrower still - a single resource.

scope.description: Narrowest applicable target. Subscription-wide exemptions require Owner-tier quorum.

justification.description: Human-readable explanation. Enforced minimum length so 'ok' or 'lgtm' does not count.

requested_by.description: Entra OID of the requester. MUST differ from approved_by.

approved_by.description: Entra OID of the approver (Owner-tier). MUST differ from requested_by.

state.description: Lifecycle state - auto-transitioned to expired by the expiry job.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC. Enforcement re-applies once this timestamp passes.
